---
title: "Plants"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr)
library(DT)

sp_list <- read.csv(
  here::here(
    "../LaSelva-MetaNetwork-data/data/L1/L1_harmonized_names/plant_sp_list.csv"
  )
)

df <- sp_list %>%
  arrange(order, family, species, common_name) %>%
  distinct(order, family, species, common_name) %>%
    mutate(
  species_link = paste0(
    "<a href='https://space-lab-msu.github.io/LaSelvaMetaNetwork.github.io/species_information.html?species=",
    URLencode(species),
    "'>",
    species,
    "</a>"
  )
)%>%
  rename(`common name` = common_name) %>%
  select(order, family, species = species_link, `common name`)

datatable(
  df,
  escape = FALSE,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = "RowGroup",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    rowGroup = list(dataSrc = 0),
    columnDefs = list(
      list(visible = FALSE, targets = 0)
    )
  )
)
```
